diagrams.title: Process State Transition Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows the five states of a process and transitions between them
diagrams.purpose: Understanding process lifecycle and state changes in operating systems

diagrams.title: Process Control Block Structure
diagrams.description: Internal structure of PCB showing all stored information
diagrams.purpose: Understanding what information OS maintains about each process

diagrams.title: Context Switching Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how CPU switches from one process to another
elements: Save Process A's state to PCB-A
Update Process A's state to Ready
Select Process B from Ready Queue
Load Process B's state from PCB-B
Update Process B's state to Running
Timer interrupt or system call triggers switch
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how CPU manages multiple processes efficiently
